subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou before Whose essential oneness the unity-seekers stand powerless, and to Whose recognition those endowed with knowledge confess their impotence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من عجز الموحدون عن عرفان توحید ذاتک و اقر العارفون بالقصور عن
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for protection, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
